originalTitle: Score a discounted Xbox console before the prices jump
summary: Microsoft announced today that the price of all Xbox models will rise in August, the second time in less than a year as memory prices continue to wreak havoc on every industry from cars to computing. Thankfully, we’re already out looking for Prime Day deals, and we were able to find some discounts on both […]
content: Microsoft announced today that the price of all Xbox models will rise in August, the second time in less than a year as memory prices continue to wreak havoc on every industry from cars to computing. Thankfully, we’re already out looking for Prime Day deals, and we were able to find some discounts on both the Xbox Series S and Xbox Series X ahead of the price hikes. [Product: Microsoft Xbox Series X | https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FXbox-Series-X-Video-Game-Console-Black%2F443574645, https://goto.target.com/c/482924/81938/2092?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.target.com%2Fp%2Fxbox-series-x-console%2F-%2FA-80790841] The 1TB Xbox Series X is discounted to $573 and $573.99 at Walmart and Target respectively, a significant reduction from the usual $649.99 price point. This is the model with a built-in 4K Blu-ray player that will go up to $799.99 in just over a month — and it’s what I’d recommend if you’re shopping for a new console to play GTA VI on later this year. [Product: Xbox Series S | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.dell.com/en-us/shop/microsoft-xbox-series-s-gaming-console/apd/ad285692/gaming-gaming-accessories#overview_section] If you’re just looking for the disc-free Xbox Series S, which is usually $399.99 but will rise to $499.99 in August, Dell has the 512GB model on sale for $349.99, which is the current best deal. Target isn’t far behind, with the same console listed for $379.99, which may be worth it if you want to pick it up locally or have other discounts at Target like the Circle Card.
chineseTitle: 在价格上涨之前购买打折的 Xbox 主机
chineseSummary: 微软今天宣布，所有 Xbox 机型的价格将于 8 月份上涨，这是不到一年内的第二次上涨，因为内存价格继续对从汽车到计算机的各个行业造成严重破坏。值得庆幸的是，我们已经在寻找 Prime Day 优惠，并且我们能够在这两个方面找到一些折扣 [...]
chineseContent: 微软今天宣布，所有 Xbox 机型的价格将于 8 月份上涨，这是不到一年内的第二次上涨，因为内存价格继续对从汽车到计算机的各个行业造成严重破坏。值得庆幸的是，我们已经开始寻找 Prime Day 优惠，并且在价格上涨之前找到了 Xbox Series S 和 Xbox Series X 的一些折扣。 [产品：微软Xbox Series X | https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FXbox-Series-X-Video-Game-Console-Black%2F443574645， https://goto.target.com/c/482924/81938/2092?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.target.com%2Fp%2Fxbox-series-x-console%2F-%2FA-80790841] 1TB Xbox Series X 在沃尔玛和塔吉特分别折扣至 573 美元和 573.99 美元，比平时大幅折扣价格为 649.99 美元。这款内置 4K 蓝光播放器的型号将在短短一个多月内涨至 799.99 美元——如果你今年晚些时候要购买一台新游戏机来玩 GTA VI，我会推荐这款产品。 [产品：Xbox Series S | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://www.dell.com/en-us/shop/microsoft-xbox-series-s-gaming-console/apd/ad285692/gaming-gaming-accessories#overview_section]如果你只是在寻找无光盘的Xbox Series S，通常售价为399.99美元，但会升至8 月份售价 499.99 美元，戴尔 512GB 型号售价 349.99 美元，是目前最优惠的价格。 Target 也不甘落后，同样的游戏机售价为 379.99 美元，如果你想在本地购买或者在 Target 享受 Circle 卡等其他折扣，这可能是值得的。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
